strengthening_paths.suggestion: State a concrete two-action finite-grid witness template for Conjecture 2 in the proposal, even if not proved, so the open-set non-rectangularity claim is less dependent on prose geometry.

Add a short comparison line to IshikawaHe2023 distinguishing their conditional f-constraint from the proposal's pointwise latent-kernel f-divergence plus arm-mean tube, since this is the closest published-axis threat.
If Stage 0 specializes the divergence, use KL first and record which parts of Conjecture 1 still hold for general convex lower-semicontinuous f versus KL-only compactness/duality.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0 with Conjectures 1 and 2 as the novelty-bearing statements and Theorems 1 and 2 explicitly retained as calibration checks.
